# Claude Code overview

Claude Code is an AI-powered coding assistant that helps you build features, fix bugs, and automate development tasks.

## Key capabilities
- Describe what you want in plain language
- For bugs, paste an error message or describe the symptom
- Claude traces the issue, identifies root cause, implements fix
- Works directly with git (stages, commits, branches, PRs)
- Connects external tools via MCP
- CLAUDE.md for persistent instructions
- Custom commands and hooks

## Available surfaces
- Terminal CLI
- VS Code / JetBrains extensions
- Desktop app (Mac/Windows)
- Web (claude.ai/code)
- GitHub Actions / GitLab CI/CD
- Slack integration
